title: 20m Red Velvet Ribbon, 25mm Christmas Velvet Ribbon for Xmas Tree Bows Making Gift Wrapping Party Decor Wedding Anniversary
features: 【You Will Receive】1 roll of 1 inch red ribbon velvet, total length 21.8 yards, long enough to meet your diverse needs for wrapping gifts, bouquets bundling, making handicrafts, etc.
【Luxurious Velvet Texture】Made of premium polyester velvet, this single-sided velvet ribbon christmas is not easy to break and reusable, features a plush, soft texture and exudes elegance.
【Vibrant Color】The velvet ribbon thick features a rich red hue, which is bright and not easy to fade, can make your gift more attractive and also add beauty to your party or festival activities.

【Convenient Design】The wide red velvet ribbon comes in a roll, making it easy to use and store, and tangle-free. You can cut it to suit your needs, whether it's DIY, gift wrapping, or party decorations.

【Wide Application】Red velvet wrapping ribbon can be used for gift wrapping, bouquet bundling, bow making, holiday embellishments, and crafts, making it an excellent choice for Thanksgiving, Christmas, Valentine's Day, weddings, birthdays, anniversaries, and more.
